title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Bullet-3
description: The UniFi G5 Bullet camera has a 5MP CMOS sensor with a resolution of 2688 x 1512 at 30fps, a lens with a focal length of about 4mm , observation angle of 84.4° , IR illuminator for night vision up to 10m, audio microphone, 10/100 Mbps LAN port with PoE support and IPX4 protection for use in an outdoor environment. Thanks to the great holder, you are able to direct the image in all 3 axes The camera can only be powered via a PoE adapter or switch supporting the 802.3af standard and passive PoE (36 .. 57V DC). The maximum consumption of the camera is only 4W ! Using the Unifi Protect mobile application from version 2.2.7 / 2.7.18 (web) / 1.10.0 (mobile) you have the possibility to monitor the live image on all cameras connected to the NVR. The application is available for iOS and Android platforms Device Holder + screws
